title: pouteria multiflora var. urbanii
intro: Pouteria multiflora var. urbanii, also known as the Guanacaste tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Caribbean and Central America, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. This tree has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pouteria multiflora var. urbanii include its potential to help lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the tree are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
